name: Marshy Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. On low speed, cream butter and 1 cup sugar until fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing until blended.
3. Sift dry ingredients together, then add alternately with milk and vanilla.
4. Mash half the blueberries by hand and stir in.
5. Grease muffin tins well with butter and also grease the top surface of the pans.
6. Pour batter into each muffin cup, piling it high.
7. Sprinkle sugar over the tops of the muffins.
8. Bake in a 375 degree oven for 30 minutes.
9. Allow to cool in the pan for at least 30 minutes.
